description:
PoplePAC 1.1.0 is here!


This major release introduces extensive architecture enhancements, interactive Z-Matrix editing, real-time MOPAC keyword synchronization, and significant build optimizations.

🌟 NEW: Z-Matrix Editor & Undo/Redo Support
Full Z-Matrix building and editing capabilities right inside the GUI, with real-time connectivity indexing (`na`, `nb`, `nc`), exact coordinate previews, and complete CommandStack Undo/Redo support (`SetZmatCommand`).

💡 NEW: Interactive MOPAC Keywords Preview & Syntax Highlighting
Our MOPAC Keywords Editor now features live `QSyntaxHighlighter` color coding (distinguishing keywords, Cartesian coordinates, and Z-Matrix connectivity indices in Teal, Purple, and Orange). Plus, your keyword previewer stays 100% dynamically synchronized with 3D scene modifications and Undo/Redo actions in real time.

🏗️ Decoupled Pure CLI & UI Architecture
We decoupled core computational algorithms (`excited_states`, `reaction_worker`, `quantum_evaluator`) from PySide6 GUI dependencies, introducing a standalone pure CLI entry point (`poplepac info`, `symmetry`, `coordination`, `reaction`) that runs instantly without loading graphical libraries.

⚡ Build & Packaging Optimizations
Removed obsolete Cython hidden imports and disabled UPX binary compression (`--noupx`), ensuring rapid application startup, uncorrupted VTK/PySide6 DLL loading, and rock-solid stability on Windows.

Update now to experience the most powerful, flexible, and robust version of PoplePAC yet!
